/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib CMakeFiles/test.dir/test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/hpmtest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/main.cpp.o -o test.app/Contents/MacOS/test -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets ../src/libhotplugmonitor.a -framework CoreFoundation -framework IOKit /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
